settler/idle/left.note: Cell-wise reflected from the right-facing idle row after normalization to the locked walk family scale.

settler/walk/down.note: Imagegen identity preserved; only the pants/boots region is reflected on alternating frames to enforce a readable front-facing two-foot gait.

settler/walk/left.note: Cell-wise reflected from the clean right-facing peer after two generated left rows failed dense-width stability.

settler/walk/right.note: Right-facing frontier settler walk matched to the action identity master.

settler/walk/up.note: Back-facing locked identity with lower-leg cadence regenerated after gait audit.
